ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the exercise */,
  "exercise_type" TEXT /* Type of exercise performed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exercise in minutes */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the exercise */,
  "exercise_date" TEXT /* Date when the exercise was performed */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the exercise in kilometers */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the exercise */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the exercise session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercises_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user taking the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of medication intake */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication schedule */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication schedule */,
  "refills_left" INTEGER /* Number of refills left for the medication */,
  "taken_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was last taken */,
  "taken_time" TEXT /* Time when the medication was last taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who responded to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of health alert */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the user responded to the alert */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert occurred */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the user's response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_alert_type FOREIGN KEY ("alert_type") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled appointment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment or health check */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the appointment will take place */,
  "reminder_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a reminder has been sent to the user */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Whether the user has confirmed the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "walks" (
  "walk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each walk */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who walked */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance walked in kilometers */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the walk in minutes */,
  "walk_date" TEXT /* Date when the walk occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the walk took place */,
  "route_taken" TEXT /* Route taken during the walk */,
  "steps_taken" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the walk */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the walk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("walk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_walks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_walks_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g. park, gym, neighborhood) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wearables" (
  "wearable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wearable device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the wearable */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of wearable device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the wearable device */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date when the wearable was last synchronized */,
  "battery_life" INTEGER /* Battery life of the wearable in days */,
  "water_resistance" INTEGER /* Whether the wearable is water-resistant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wearable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wearables_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of health alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g. low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (medication or appointment) */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date when the reminder was sent */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time when the reminder was sent */,
  "sent" INTEGER /* Whether the reminder was sent successfully */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
